chapter_title.en: Chapter on Shortening the Prayer on the Way to Arafat

text: 2984 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ يُتِمُّونَ اَلصَّلاَةَ بِعَرَفَاتٍ فَقَالَ «وَيْلَهُمْ أَوْ وَيْحَهُمْ وَ أَيُّ سَفَرٍ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُ لاَ يُتَمُّ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2984 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "The people of Mecca pray the full (four-unit) prayer at Arafat."
Imam (as) said: "Woe to them, or alas for them! What journey is more arduous than this? It should not be performed in full (but shortened to two units)."
